messages.message: It is recommended not to use reserved keyword "class" as function parameter name. Found: $class
Filenames should be all lowercase with hyphens as word separators. Expected activation.php, but found Activation.php.
Class file names should be based on the class name with "class-" prepended. Expected class-activation.php, but found Activation.php.
